title: Shape Shifter Curse Addon
description:
Added my personal modifications to the original mods to expand their gameplay.
More skills, more abilities, more traits
body:
![Shape Shifer Curse Addon logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5df2109afddb4ceefb3e6b5d4780538f958c1d44_0.webp)
This is an addon for the Shape Shifter Curse mod. It introduces new mechanics, gameplay styles, and abilities for various forms, allowing you to access even more powerful forms.

When the curse completely fuses with the Moon Marrow, you are no longer a mere mortal, but an Apostle of the Moon.

You can go to GitHub to download the latest test package; I will update it on releases from time to time.

[SSCA GitHub Releases](https://github.com/MangZai-120/shape-shifter-curse-addon/releases)

There is a Chinese tutorial and a English tutorial.The tutorials in Chinese are more detailed, so you can check them out using your browser's auto-translate feature.

[幻形者诅咒扩展包中文百科](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/24327.html)

[Wiki](https://shape-shifter-curse-addon.readthedocs.io/zh-cn/latest/)

## 🔑Evolution Tool
![golden cross ring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2e0fdab2779c14aa02c0f9d283d0ee8cd92115e.png)

A cross-ring condensed from moonlight. Use it during a Cursed Moon while in your Complete Form to expand your abilities.

# v6.0.0 Update — Two New Forms!

This update brings you two new evolution forms of the Anubis Wolf line: **SP Anubis (Netherjudge)** and **Golden Sandstorm**.

---

## SP Anubis (Netherjudge)

The ultimate fusion of the Lunar Marrow Ring's curse and undead essence. You are no longer just the leader of the pack — you are the judge of souls.

- **Soul Sight** — low-HP enemies within 16 blocks glow and emit soul particles, with no place to hide.
- **Death Sentence** — bonus damage against dying targets.
- **Wither Hunt** — gain bonus movement speed when withered enemies are nearby.
- **Domain of Death** — after a charge, transform a 16-block radius into Soul Sand for 15 seconds, applying Slowness, Wither, and a max-HP reduction to enemies inside.
- **Court of Spectral Wolves** — howl to summon wither-infused spectral wolf minions; doubled in number while the Domain is active.
- **Undead Neutrality** — undead mobs no longer attack you unless provoked.
- **Soul Sand Recovery** — slowly regenerate while standing on Soul Sand or Soul Soil.

## Golden Sandstorm

A wither-infused sandstorm variant of the Anubis Wolf, focused on **Erosion Brand stacking** and **detonation bursts**.

- **Withering Sand** — channel for 1s, then unleash a 15-block sandstorm, blinding enemies and applying 1 stack of Erosion Brand.
- **Erosion Brand** — melee attacks stack Brand (up to 3); at 3 stacks, the next hit triggers a passive burst dealing 20% of the target's current HP and healing yourself.
- **Detonate Brand** — actively detonate all Brand stacks for burst damage and self-recovery.
- **Brand Sense** — branded enemies glow yellow / orange / red based on stack count.
- **Backlash Burst** — taking damage automatically knocks back nearby enemies and applies Wither I.
- **Wither Adaptation** — fully immune to Wither, Blindness, and Sand Blind.

### New Exclusive Trinkets Are Waiting For You

If you find any bug, please leave a comment or open an issue on GitHub. Thanks!

[Shape Shifter Curse Addon](https://github.com/MangZai-120/shape-shifter-curse-addon.git)
